title: erigeron kiukiangensis
intro: Erigeron kiukiangensis, also known as Kiukiang fleabane, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family. It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Erigeron kiukiangensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system, making it useful for treating various health conditions such as fever, cough, and respiratory issues. In herbal preparations, Erigeron kiukiangensis is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be dried and used as a herbal powder for various applications.
